g.title: ECU_12PIN
g.text: REV 2. Pin 1 fuse 20A, pin 7 fuse 20A (separate relays).

g.title: W_ENGINE_GND
g.text: Brown wire :: cylinder head ground stud. Do not omit.

g.title: CRANK_VR
g.text: OEM M52 crank sensor — 60-2 missing tooth. MaxxECU trigger type: N-1.

g.title: ECU_CMC
g.text: STUB — pin numbers not yet confirmed
STUB ONLY. Actual Cinch CMC pin numbers unknown — download Race wiring PDF from maxxecu.com/downloads to fill in. Pin labels here are logical names only.

g.title: CAM_HALL
g.text: M52 VANOS cam Hall sensor (swapped connector)
VANOS head requires sensor swap to BMW PN 12141726590 (fits non-VANOS harness connector). Alternative: cut harness connector and add VANOS-type plug + switched 12V.

g.title: W_CAM
g.text: BMW 12141726590 sensor — non-VANOS connector on harness side.

g.title: IAT
g.text: Mounted in intake boot upstream of throttle body.

g.title: VANOS_SOL
g.text: PWM via GPO 3. Disable in tune at 07K swap.

g.title: W_CAN
g.text: Twisted pair. 120ohm at far end if bus run over 1 m.

g.title: CAN_BUS_JUNCTION
g.text: MaxxECU CAN 1 (16-pin pins 9-10) feeds both the 8HP CAN harness and Gauge.S cluster. Bus speed: 500kbps. MaxxECU CAN 1 has built-in 120ohm terminator. Add 120ohm terminator at far end of bus if bus run over 1 meter total.

g.title: HP8_CAN
g.text: MaxxECU GEN1 8HP CAN harness ~$368.61. See maxxecu.com/store/gearbox/8hp/maxxecu-8hp-gen1-cable-harness. Verify hardware ID before purchase: maxxecu.com/webhelp/advanced-8hp-hardware_identifier.html

g.title: GAUGES_CAN
g.text: Gauge.S E36 PNP cluster CAN input
Gauge.S receives MaxxECU Default 1.3 CAN output (500kbps). Config file: maxxecu.json (see gauge-s-maxxecu repo). Enable in MTune: CAN :: Default CAN output :: MaxxECU Default 1.3.

g.title: DCT_SHIFTER
g.text: UP :: MaxxECU DIN 2 (Transmission UP shift). DOWN :: MaxxECU DIN 1 (Transmission DOWN shift). MTune: Advanced :: 8HP :: Shifter type :: 8HP SEQ shifter. Hold UP = launch control / transbrake.

g.title: FLEX_FUEL
g.text: Digital PWM signal :: MaxxECU DIN 3 (GPO 7). MaxxECU reads ethanol % natively.

g.title: PST_F1
g.text: Mount: M52 VANOS banjo bolt (M14x1.5 :: M10x1.0 adapter :: PST-F1). Pressure :: AIN 3 (0-5V, 0-10 bar / 0-145 psi). Temp :: AIN 1 (NTC, -40 to +140°C). Moves to iABED 07K oil housing M10x1.0 port at Phase 3 with no wiring changes.

g.title: BOOST_SOL
g.text: MaxxECU GPO 1 :: PWM duty control. Budget alt: Bosch N75 0280142431.

g.title: FAN_RELAY
g.text: Stage 1: OEM thermostat switch triggers relay standalone. Stage 2 (MaxxECU): GPO 6 triggers relay in parallel with thermostat switch. SPAL PWM upgrade: swap fan motor to SPAL 30102049 and wire GPO 6 direct PWM.
